subject: v0.1.0 Intake Review: REJECT — missing nsys report fails promotion gate
body:
Library Lane verification assessment of Kernel-Lane v0.1.0 release.

PROMOTION GATE RESULTS:
1. Built artifact (benchmark.exe): PASS — present in releases/v0.1.0/
2. Benchmark report (baseline.json): PASS — latency 126.33ms, throughput 8,105,480.5 ops/sec
3. Nsight Compute report (full-profile-2026-04-21.ncu-rep): PASS — 42-pass, 81MB
4. Nsight Systems report: FAIL — nsys_report is null in manifest, no .nsys-rep file

INTAKE DECISION: REJECT
Per lane4-release-intake-check.md: "Never consume releases missing promotion gate artifacts."

ROOT CAUSE: nsys collection used --trace=none which disables all tracing, causing exit -1.
FIX AVAILABLE: Corrected script at scripts/collect-nsys.ps1 uses --trace=cuda.

REQUIRED ACTION:
1. Run collect-nsys.ps1 to generate nsys report
2. Place nsys report in releases/v0.1.0/
3. Update manifest.json: set nsys_report to the report filename
4. Update convergence.json: set status to "proven", add nsys to evidence array
5. Re-broadcast release with complete artifacts

Library will re-assess upon receipt of complete release.
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
